title: Trees Drop Logs
description: Wood blocks will now drop their respective Log equivalent instead
body:
![Trees Drop Logs](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cRHQSD0g/images/7670708d6ee42ffb08e1921d2aca6ca0829ad1e3.png)

![Environment](https://img.shields.io/badge/environment-server%20or%20singleplayer-00AF5C)
[![Discord](https://img.shields.io/discord/807935906055979039?logo=discord&logoColor=white&label=discord&color=6577E6
)
](https://discord.gg/HermTPzzG3)
[![YouTube](https://img.shields.io/youtube/channel/subscribers/UC4kkLkiJTtmlTCuFExqtFKA?style=flat&logo=youtube&label=youtube&color=FF323D)](https://www.youtube.com/@flamesatgames)
[![Patreon](https://img.shields.io/endpoint.svg?url=https%3A%2F%2Fshieldsio-patreon.vercel.app%2Fapi%3Fusername%3Dflamesatgames%26type%3Dpatrons&style=flat)](https://patreon.com/flamesatgames)

**Trees Drop Logs** simply makes all "Wood" blocks drop their "Log" equivalent instead - keeping your inventory neat when chopping custom trees that use Wood variants. Use Silk Touch to bypass the conversion into Logs!

Compatible with:
- Biomes O' Plenty
- Regions Unexplored
- Terralith
- William Wythers’ Expanded Ecosphere
- William Wythers’ Overhauled Overworld
- Pale Garden Backport: The Garden Awakens
- Promenade
- Architect’s Palette
- Deeper and Darker
- Better Nether
- Better End
- [Let’s Do] Vinery
- [Let’s Do] Beachparty
- [Let’s Do] Meadow
- [Let’s Do] BloomingNature
- [Let’s Do Addon] Apple Wood
- Tech Reborn
- Bewitchment
- ...And many more!
